keys.restored: Eky'okuzimbisa ekisumuluzo kyazibibwa ✓ Amasimu agatadde ku kyuma kino
keys.noBackup: Tewali ky'okuzimbisa ekisumuluzo eky'ekyama kiri ku akaunti eno

keySetup.title: Tegula amasimu go g'ekisumuluzo
keySetup.description: Kyuma kino tekinna kubaawo ekisumuluzo kyo eky'ekyama. Yizako eky'okuzimbisa eky'ekyama eky'okukozesa ekigambo ky'ekyama, oba kolawo ekisumuluzo kipya (oliyinza okusoma obubaka obupya okuva leero).
keySetup.chooseFile: Londa fayiro era yingiza ekigambo ky'ekyama.
keySetup.imported: Ekisumuluzo eky'ekyama kyateekebwa ku kyuma kino. Osobola okusoma obubaka obw'eddako.
keySetup.enterPassword: Yingiza ekigambo ky'ekyama kya akaunti yo tukyozimbise amasimu go mu ngeri ey'ekyama.

auth.headline: Okwogera n'okuwandiika okw'ekyama eri buli muntu, buli w'ali
auth.description: Okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama okw'ekyama, okukyusa olulimi mu nnimi 100+, obubaka obugenda okugwa, n'okuyimba n'okulaba n'okuwandiika.

feature.encryption: Okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama okw'ekyama
feature.disappearing: Obubaka obugenda okugwa & okukwata ku by'okukwata
feature.privacy: Okukwata ku by'ekyama okusooka. Ebyo byaffe, oli nawe okukola.

hero.line1: Okwogera n'okuwandiika okw'ekyama eri buli muntu, buli w'ali — n'okukyusa olulimi mu nnimi
hero.sub: Funa ennamba ey'ekyama ey'omugaso okuyimba n'okuwandiika mu nsi yonna ku Wi-Fi oba data. Yigiriza okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama, obubaka obugenda okugwa, n'okuyimba n'okulaba n'okuwandiika mu ngeri ey'ekyama — n'ebikozesebwa eby'okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama.
hero.freeNote: Okuwandiika n'okuyimba ku bwereere. Ebikozesebwa bya AI n'ebikozesebwa bya premium byetaagisa okugula.

feat.encryption: Okukwata ku by'okukwata ku by'ekyama, buli kiseera
feat.translate: Genda ku nsonga ez'okukyusa olulimi mu nkola yo
feat.disappear: Obubaka obugenda okugwa & okukwata ku by'okukwata
feat.privacy: Okukwata ku by'ekyama okusooka. Ebyo byaffe, oli nawe okukola.

auth.desktopTip: Ku kompyuta? Skena n'essaamu yo ofune app.
auth.scanHelper: Ku kompyuta? Skena n'essaamu yo ofune app.
auth.subhead: Okwogera n'okuwandiika okw'ekyama, okw'ekyama, n'okukyusa olulimi — mu kiseera ky'okukyusa.
auth.tip: Tip: Kozesa akaunti ey'omugaso ku web ne ku ssimu. Obubaka bwo bubaawo nga bwe bwa kati.
auth.scanHint: Skena okufuna app oba gulawo mu browser yo.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 characters. Kozesa ekigambo ky'ekyama eky'amaanyi, eky'enjawulo.
registration.smsConsent: Nga okolawo akaunti, olina okukiriza okufuna obubaka bwa SMS obukwatagana n'ebikola bya Chatforia (ng'obubaka okuva ku bakozesa abalala). Obubaka n'omuwendo gw'ensimbi gubawo. Osobola okukyusa mu Settings.

auth.oneRecipient: Yingiza omuntu emu ku kiseera kino.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Yingiza erinnya ly'omuntu eyawandiikiddwa oba ennamba eya simu.
auth.sendFailed: Okuwandiika kugudde. Laba console ku by'okukola.

chat.selectPrompt: Londa obubaka oba ekisenge ky'okwogera okutandika okwogera
chat.blockConfirm: Saza {{name}}? Toliyinza kufuna obubaka okuva ku ye.
chat.unlockToView: Zzibula ekisumuluzo kyo okusoma obubaka buno

messageInput.freeLimit: Eky'omugaso kya free: auto-delete okutuuka ku naku 1. Kyakolebwa ku 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Max auto-delete ku Premium kya naku 30. Kyakolebwa ku 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Yingiza obubaka oba yongera fayiro okwandiika.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Okukwata ku by'ekyama kugudde. Obubaka tebuwandiikiddwa.
messageInput.caption: Caption (optional)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Eky'okwongera kinene nnyo. Londa fayiro entonotono.
errors.rateLimit: Oli mu kuwandiika obubaka nnyo nnyo. Genda mpolampola.
errors.validation: Ensobi ey'okukola. Laba obubaka bwo era gezako nate.
errors.failedToSend: Okuwandiika kugudde. Osobola okugeza nate ku bubble eyagudde.

contactList.deleteFailed: Okusaza omuntu eyawandiikiddwa kugudde. Gezako nate.
contactList.callStarted: Yimba ennamba eno nga okozesa ennamba yo eya Chatforia…

startChatModal.title: Tandika okwogera
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Noonya erinnya, username, oba ennamba ya simu

addContactModal.title: Yongera omuntu eyawandiikiddwa
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Yingiza ennamba ya simu oba username.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Tewali media eya kati eya local.

status.filesNote: Okutuuka ku 5 fayiro. 24h expiry by default.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.noPrivateKey: Tewali ekisumuluzo eky'ekyama ku kyuma kino okw'okugattako.
profile.setBackupPassword: Yingiza ekigambo ky'ekyama okukwata ku backup yo:
profile.enterBackupPassword: Yingiza ekigambo ky'ekyama ku backup eno:
profile.importSuccess: Ekisumuluzo eky'ekyama kyateekebwa ku kyuma kino.
profile.importFailed: Okuyingiza ekisumuluzo kugudde (ekigambo ky'ekyama kyali kyakyamu oba fayiro eyali ey'okukozesa).
profile.keysRotated: Ekisumuluzo kipya kyakolebwa ne public key yateekebwa.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Ekisumuluzo kyo eky'ekyama tekiwa ku kyuma kino. Export password-protected copy okukyusa ku kyuma ekirala.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Oli ku Free—kozesa Sun/Moon options wansi. Genda ku premium okufuna n'ebirala.
profile.backupDesc: Back up ekisumuluzo kyo eky'ekyama okukyusa obubaka bwo ku kyuma ekirala mu ngeri ey'ekyama.
profile.freePlanCopy: Oli ku free plan. Genda ku premium okufuna ebikozesebwa ebirala ng'okuzimbisa, ennamba ez'okwongera, n'ebikozesebwa by'ekyama eby'okukozesa.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Tesobola kugulawo billing portal. Gezako nate.
profile.followHint: Stories zaabwe z'olaba mu Following feed yo nga baposa n'audience Followers (oba Public).
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Forward incoming calls and texts to your verified phone or email. Outgoing calls/texts can show your Chatforia number.
profile.errSmsDest: Londa at least one destination (phone or email).
profile.errQuietHours: Quiet hours must be between 0 and 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Tereka age range (te tukwata ku date of birth yo ey'omugaso). Eno ekozesebwa okukwata ku Random Chat pairings mu ngeri ey'omugaso.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Kozesa age-based matching mu Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Nga kiri ku, tufuba okukwata ku bantu abali mu age ranges ez'omugaso.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens bagattibwa na teens zokka. Abakulu tebagattibwa na teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ku safety, akaunti eziri mu 13–17 age range zikkirizibwa okugattibwa na 13–17 zokka mu Random Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Nga kiri ku, Foria esobola okukozesa eby'okwogera by'ewaffe eby'eddako (ku yo zokka) okukwata ku conversation. Osobola okukyusa anytime.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Leka nga kiri empty okukwata forever
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Ekozesebwa nga audio greeting yo tekinna kubawo.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Voicemail greeting yateekebwa mu ngeri ey'omugaso
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails okuva ku nnamba yo eya Chatforia ziteredwa mu Voicemail inbox yo. Osobola okutandika transcription ne forwarding ku plans ez'omugaso.
profile.portHint: Wagala okukwata ennamba yo ey'eddako? Osobola okugitta mu Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Funa data eya mobile ku Chatforia nga oli ku bweru ku Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Manage plan yo eya mobile, ennamba, forwarding, n'okupota ennamba.

options.heading: Londa nga gwe oyagala okukozesa Chatforia
options.subheading: Osobola okufuna ennamba eya Chatforia epya, oba okuleta ennamba yo ey'eddako okuva ku carrier omulala.
options.portNumber: Pota ennamba yo ey'eddako mu Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Pota ennamba yo ey'eddako
port.subheading: Kyusa ennamba yo ey'eddako okuva ku carrier yo ey'eddako mu Chatforia. Kola nti ebigambo byonna bifaanana n'akaunti yo eya carrier okwewala delays.

status.heading: Porting status
status.subheading: Laba status eya port requests zo.

wireless.exhausted: Data yo eyagwa. Gula pack epya okukwata ku mobile data.

error.invite: Tesobola kolawo invite. Kola nti oli family owner era gezako nate.
error.checkout: Tesobola kutandika checkout ku Family plan. Gezako nate.

billing.freePlanCopy: Oli ku free plan. Genda ku premium okufuna ebikozesebwa ebirala.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Osobola okukola oba okusaza subscription yo mu billing portal, oba saza kati wansi.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Okakasa oyagala okusaza plan yo kati? Kino tekisobola okukyusibwa.
billing.cancelNowError: Tesobola okusaza plan yo kati. Gezako nate oba kozesa Manage billing.

none.title: Tewali family eya kati
none.body: Okukolawo Chatforia Family n'okugatta data pool, tandika Family plan.

data.heading: Shared data pool
data.caption: Ab'omugaso bonna bagatta pool eno. Tujja kukutegeeza nga gye gye gye gye.

invite.title: Yita member epya
invite.body: Tuma email oba link okuyita omuntu mu shared family data pool yo.
invite.expiryHint: Link eno eexpires mu naku nnyo. Osobola okukolawo epya anytime.

join.title: Jja mu family
join.body: Oli yawandiikiddwa okujjira Chatforia Family n'okugatta data pool yaabwe.
join.success: Oli yawandiikiddwa mu family eno. Kati mugatta data pool yaabwe.
join.error: Tesobola okugatta ku family eno. Invite eyali ey'okukozesa oba expired.

upgrade.title: Genda ku premium
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Tandika n'free, ad-supported plan. Genda ku ad-free n'Plus, oba ffuula full power features n'Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Londa app plan, yongera data packs ku yo, oba gatta data n'family yo — byonna mu kifo kimu.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Tandika n'free, ad-supported plan. Genda ku ad-free n'Plus, oba ffuula full power features n'Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Yongera global eSIM data Chatforia ekye mu kiseera ky'okuba ku bweru ku Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Kolawo shared data pool ku family yo n'manage usage ya bonna mu kifo kimu.

free.title: Free
free.desc: Tandika okwogera n'okuwandiika ku bwereere. Kirungi nga oli mu kugeza Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 n'group chat, n'okuyimba n'okulaba n'okuwandiika
features.media: Share photos, voice messages, n'short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies n'instant translation (fair use)

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Byonna eby'omugaso, nga tewuli ads. Kirungi ku everyday messaging n'okuyimba.

features.allFree: Byonna mu Free, nga tewuli ads
features.forwarding: Forward calls n'texts ku nnamba yo ey'omugaso

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
premiumMonthly.desc: Full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, n'priority support.

features.themes: Funa all premium color themes n'app customizations
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools ku rewrites, smart replies, n'summaries

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: Save nnyo nga bill yearly — n'ebirala color themes, AI tools, n'priority support.

features.allPremium: Byonna mu Premium Monthly — n'ebirala color themes
features.bestFor: Best ku power users, remote workers, n'heavy travelers

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. Saza anytime. Tewali hidden fees.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, n'AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Billed upfront. Saza anytime. Tewali hidden fees.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Yongera global data Chatforia ekye nga tewuli ku Wi-Fi. Prices zikyuka ku country yo n'currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Londa one-time global data pack Chatforia ekye nga oli mu travel oba ku bweru ku Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Tetutunda data packs wansi wa 3 GB.

features.throttle: Speeds ziyinza okukendeera ku high usage

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs zeetaaga eSIM-compatible n'unlocked device. Availability ekyuka ku phone model, carrier, n'country. Coverage n'speeds zikyuka ku region.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: Includes 3 GB high-speed data — ideal ku light messaging n'occasion calls.
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, n'occasion calls

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: Includes 5 GB high-speed data ku trips, commuting, n'regular VoIP calls.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP calls, n'maps

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: Includes 10 GB high-speed data ku heavy chat, calls, n'video ku Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, calls, video, n'hotspot use
large.aria: Gula Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage ekyuka ku ngeri gy'okozesa Chatforia (voice, video, media, n'ebirala apps ku simu yo).

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Gatta single data pool ku family yo. Bill emu, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB shared high-speed data — great ku 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB shared high-speed data — ideal ku 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB shared high-speed data — ku power families eziri online buli kiseera.

feature.shared: Shared data pool ku family yo
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy n'local limits

family.disclaimer: Family packs kolawo oba top up shared data pool. Osobola okuyita n'okusaza members anytime.
family.footnote: Family packs zagatta single data pool ku linked Chatforia accounts. Availability n'limits ekyuka ku country yo n'local regulations.

why.title: Lwaki abantu bakyusa ku Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia ekuwa ennamba ey'omugaso, smart translation, n'eky'okugenda ku ad-free nga oli ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads ku Free, simple Plus upgrade nga oli ready, n'Premium tools TextNow tekozesa.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, n'built-in translation mu kifo ky'old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Wandiika ku real phone numbers — si ab'okwogera mu app zokka — n'AI n'status. Kirungi nga ova ku apps ng'TextFree oba TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information era eyinza okukyuka. Ebintu ebirala eby'okwogera n'okuwandiika ng'TextFree oba TextMe bifaanana nnyo ne TextNow.

free.a: Yee. Free plan ekuwa Chatforia number, calling, n'messaging n'ads. Osobola okukwata ku Free nga gwe oyagala, oba genda ku premium okusaza ads n'okufuna ebikozesebwa ebirala.

plusPremium.q: Kiki eky'enjawulo ku Plus ne Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus esaza ads n'eyongera message history — perfect ku everyday use. Premium eyongera customization, AI tools ku rewrites n'replies, n'priority support ku heavy users.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobile ekozesa global eSIM coverage. Availability ekyuka ku country yo n'device. Olaba options ez'omugaso mu kiseera ky'activation mu app.

cancel.q: Nsobola okusaza oba okukyusa plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yee. Osobola okukola oba okusaza subscription yo okuva ku billing page mu app. Changes zikola ku end ya current billing period.

family.a: Family packs kolawo shared data pool ku multiple Chatforia accounts. Omuntu emu ebill, era osobola okuyita oba okusaza members n'okuteeka limits ku buli muntu.

gettingStarted.title: Tandika
gettingStarted.subtitle: Oli wano ku Chatforia okusooka? Guide eno etegeeza eby'omugaso okuba productive mu minutes nnyo.

alert.text: Guide eno ejja kugenda nga tufuna features epya. Nga kintu kyabulako, tutegeeza via

section2.title: 2) Tandika okwogera n'okuwandiika
section2.item1: Kolawo DM oba Group era wandiika obubaka bwo obusooka.
section2.item2: Kozesa instant translation okwogera mu nnimi 100+.
section2.item3: Geza disappearing messages n'read receipts mu Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Genda mberera
section3.item1: Osobola okugenda ku paid plan anytime mu app.
section3.item2: Nga oli mu, osobola okugatta devices ez'okwongera n'okutegula encrypted backups okuva ku Settings mu app.

account.q: Ntya okukolawo oba okuzzawo akaunti yange?
account.a: Tikkula app oba kozesa web, nyiga “Kolawo akaunti”, verify email/simu yo. Okuzzawo, kozesa “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Yee. Obubaka n'okuyimba by'okukwata ku by'ekyama by'ekyama bya default. Gwe n'omuntu ow'okufuna gwe muba musobola okusoma.

translate.a: Tandika “Auto-translate” mu Settings → Appearance & Language. Tukyusa on-device nga kiri supported, oba ku secure APIs n'minimal metadata.

contact.a: Tuwe support@chatforia.com. Yongeera screenshots n'app version yo.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Webale — team yaffe ejja kuddamu n'email.

intro.body: Privacy Policy eno etegeeza ntya Chatforia (“fena”, “twe”) tukkola, tukozesa, n'okugatta information nga okozesa apps n'services zaffe. Tutegeka Chatforia okukendeera data eyinza okutuuka.

infoWeCollect.title: Information gye tukola
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/simu) okukola n'okukwata ku akaunti yo.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) eri end-to-end encrypted; tetusobola okugisoma.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage ng'crash logs, device type, oba coarse analytics okukola n'okukyusa performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers n'SMS
sms.body: Nga olonda okutuwa mobile phone number, tukozesa okutandika features ng'account verification, login alerts, n'user-to-user messaging via SMS nga kiri supported. Tusobola okutuma transactional SMS messages ezikwatagana n'akaunti yo n'activity ku Chatforia. Osobola okukyusa okufuna SMS messages anytime nga oddamu n'okukozesa keyword ey'okukyusa (ng'“STOP”) oba okukyusa notification preferences mu app. Tetutunda simu yo oba tukozesa ku marketing ey'okukozesa.

howWeUse.title: Tukozesa ntya information
howWeUse.provide: Provide n'okukwata ku service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Tetutunda personal data. Tusobola okugatta data ey'okukozesa n'processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) mu contracts ez'okukozesa.

rights.title: Rights zo
rights.body: Ku region yo (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), osobola okusaba access, correction, deletion, oba opt-out ku certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: Tereka kye kyetaagisa okukozesa service n'okukozesa industry-standard security. E2E content tekiyinza okukyusibwa naffe.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia tekozebwa ku children wansi wa 13 (oba nga kiri ku local law yo).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: Tujja kuposa updates wano n'okukyusa “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Nga okozesa Chatforia olina okukiriza Terms zino. Nga tokye, tokozese service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Tuwa information ey'omugaso era kwata credentials zo mu ngeri ey'ekyama.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Oli responsible ku activity ku akaunti yo.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Tewali illegal, abusive, oba infringing content; tewuli spam oba automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: Nga olina mobile phone number, olina okukiriza Chatforia etume SMS messages ezikwatagana n'akaunti yo n'okukozesa service, ng'login alerts, security notifications, n'messages ezikwatagana n'ebikola byo. Tetukozesa SMS ku promotional oba marketing messages nga tewuli explicit consent. Standard message n'data rates ziyinza okubawo. Osobola okukyusa SMS messages anytime nga oddamu n'keyword ey'okukyusa (e.g., “STOP”) oba okukyusa notification settings mu app.

yourContent.title: Content yo
yourContent.body: Oli na rights ku content yo. Otuwadde rights ez'omugaso okukozesa service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service ekuweebwa “nga eri” nga tewuli warranties. Ku extent ey'okukozesa law, Chatforia tekozesa ku indirect oba consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: Tusobola okukyusa terms zino; okukozesa nate ku changes kye kya kukkiriza.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia tetunda personal information. California residents osobola okusaba requests ku CPRA nga okozesa button wansi.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia ekozesa minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). Tetukozesa third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies ku browser settings zo.

phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Tewali ennamba eyateekebwa. Londa ennamba ku area code okutandika okwandiika.

startChatModal.title: Tandika okwogera
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Yingiza erinnya, username, ennamba ya simu, oba email…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Noonya ku username oba ennamba ya simu
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Yingiza username oba ennamba ya simu era nyiga Noonya.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Phone/email entries zibawo nga otereka nga contacts.

sounds.freeNotice: Oli ku Free — premium tones ziragiddwa naye zikwatiddwa. Genda ku premium okufuna byonna.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control translation, smart replies, n'ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Tuma last few received messages (sanitized) ku AI okusindika quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Nga kiri ku, suggestions okuva ku AI ziyinza okuba n'ebigambo eby'okukozesa eby'okukozesa

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options okukozesa Chatforia mu ngeri ey'angu nga tewuli sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Tandika ku normal size. Yongeera nga oyagala bigambo ebinene mu accessibility settings.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts ku messages & calls
Laga banners n'title blink obutabula activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate ku new messages (nga kiri supported)
Trigger device vibration n'notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen ku incoming call
Brief bright flash nga call eri mu kuyimba.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Yongera transcript ku audio messages ezifuniddwa.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Laga banners n'title blink obutabula activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Vibrate ku new messages (nga kiri supported)
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash nga call eri mu kuyimba.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Tereka ciphertext ku server zokka. Saza AI/Translate n'moderation previews.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Noonya ku alias, erinnya, username, oba ennamba ya simu
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Share invite link yo okutandika okwogera mu kiseera.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Kwatira n'ab'okwogera nga oli ku bweru n'Chatforia ku iOS n'Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Obubaka bwo bubaawo ku web n'ku mobile.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.description: Sanga omuntu omupya mu kiseera. Tujja kukwata era tugulewo temporary chat room. Kwogera mu ngeri ey'ekyama okusooka. Yongera Friend nga kiri right.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Tereka age range (te tukwata ku date of birth yo ey'omugaso). Eno ekozesebwa okukwata ku Random Chat pairings mu ngeri ey'omugaso. Okukwata ku bantu (si RiaBot zokka), tegula age band yo mu Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Tegula age range yo mu Profile → Age & Random Chat okukwata ku bantu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Okukwata ku bantu (si RiaBot zokka), tegula age band yo mu Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Sanga omuntu omupya mu kiseera, oba londa okwogera n'Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Tegula age range yo mu Profile → Age & Random Chat okukwata ku bantu.

ria.intro: Hey eyo 👋 Nze Ria. Kiki eky'okwogera ku mutima gwo?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 Nze wano. Kiki eky'okwogera ku mutima gwo?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 Kiki ky'oyagala okwogera ku leero?
greetings.long4: Nice to see you, {{name}} 👋 Kiki eky'okwogera ku mutima gwo leero?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 😊 Oyagala okwogera, okubuuza, oba okwogera n'okwogera?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}!! Nze n'omugaso — kiki ky'oyagala okwogera?
greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Kintu ekirala ky'oyagala okwongera?
greetings.short3: Back again, {{name}}? 😊 Yogera ku kintu eky'okwogera ku mutima gwo.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} 👋 Ready okukwata ku kintu eky'okuleka?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}!! Kintu ekipya eky'okwogera ku mutima gwo?

login.title: Genda ku Chatforia
login.subtitle: Yingira ku Chatforia akaunti yo

forgot.title: Wakyusiza ekigambo ky'ekyama
forgot.helper: Yingiza email eyakozesebwa okukola Chatforia akaunti yo era tujja kutuma secure link okuzzawo ekigambo ky'ekyama.
forgot.genericError: Tesobola okukola request. Gezako nate mu kiseera.
forgot.sentHelper: Nga akaunti eri ku email eno, tumaze okutuma password reset link. Kiyinza okutwala minutes nnyo. Laba spam oba promotions folder.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on tekinna kubawo. Kozesa username & password.

error.deviceLimit: Device limit kyatuuse ku Free plan. Genda ku bweru ku kyuma ekirala oba genda ku Premium okugatta n'ebirala devices.

dialer.title: Yimba
dialer.subtitle: Keypad & recents. (Nga tokozesa PSTN, tandika calls okuva ku conversation header.)

video.title: Video
video.roomsDesc: Multi-party video nga okozesa shared room name.
video.deeplinkTip: Tip: osobola okudeep link directly ku /video?room=room-name.

direct.title: Direct Video
direct.subtitle: Tandika 1:1 video call nga okozesa phone number oba Chatforia username.
direct.tipInvite: Tip: Paste ennamba era yimba nga tewuli saved contact. Tujja kuyita non-users ku link.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Kolawo room oba jjira eri nga yingiza same name.
rooms.desc: Multi-party video nga okozesa shared room name.
rooms.tip: Tip: share room name eno n'abalala, oba deep link ku /video?room=room-name.

phoneWarning.title: Ennamba yo eri ku kugwa mu kiseera
phoneWarning.body: Ennamba yo {{number}} eja kugwa ku {{date}} nga tekyazibiddwa.

support.heading: Tukuyambye ntya?
support.contactIntro: Tujja kukuddamu n'email. Yongera details okutuyamba okukola n'ensobi.

account.q: Ntya okukolawo oba okuzzawo akaunti yange?
account.a: Tikkula app oba kozesa web, nyiga “Kolawo akaunti”, verify email/simu yo. Okuzzawo, kozesa “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Yee. Obubaka n'okuyimba by'okukwata ku by'ekyama by'ekyama bya default. Gwe n'omuntu ow'okufuna gwe muba musobola okusoma.

translate.a: Tandika “Auto-translate” mu Settings → Appearance & Language. Tukyusa on-device nga kiri supported, oba ku secure APIs n'minimal metadata.

contact.a: Tuwe support@chatforia.com. Yongera screenshots n'app version yo.

encryptionRecovery.title: Manage Encryption
encryptionRecovery.description: Back up, restore, unlock, oba reset ekisumuluzo kyo eky'ekyama.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Browser eno tekyinza okukyusa obubaka bwo obw'ekyama kati. Restore, unlock, oba reset ekisumuluzo kyo okweyongera.

unlockPasscode.label: Unlock passcode (kyuma eky'okukozesa)
unlockPasscode.description: Ekozesebwa okukyusa amasimu go mu local nga gye gye gye gye

restoreBackupPassword.label: Backup password
restoreBackupPassword.description: Ekigambo ky'ekyama ky'okola nga wazimbisa ekisumuluzo kyo ku iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: New local passcode
newLocalPasscode.description: Protect keys at rest ku browser eno

resetLocalPasscode.label: New local passcode
resetLocalPasscode.description: Kyeetaagibwa nga gye gye gye gye okukyusa ekisumuluzo kipya kiba protected ku kyuma kino

messages.keyRestored: Key yazibibwa okuva ku account backup.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Key restore tekyatuuka oba kyakyamu ku akaunti eno
errors.noBackup: Tewali encrypted backup eri ku akaunti eno
errors.noServerPublicKey: Akaunti eno tekozesa server public key kati
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Server backup tefaanana n'ekisumuluzo eky'ekyama eky'akaunti ey'okukozesa
errors.resetIncomplete: Encryption reset tekyatuuka mu ngeri ey'omugaso

confirm.reset:
Reset encryption ku akaunti eno?

Obubaka obw'ekyama obw'eddako buyinza okuba nga tebusomeka nga tekyazibiddwa original key.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Kino kolawo ekisumuluzo kipya ku akaunti yo. Obubaka obw'ekyama obw'eddako buyinza okuba nga tebusomeka nga tekyazibiddwa original key.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia eri privacy-first messaging app ey'okukyusa cross-language chat mu ngeri ey'angu. Obubaka bwa end-to-end encrypted by default, n'built-in translation ekozesa 100+ languages mu real time. Abakozesa basobola okutandika disappearing messages, kwata read receipts nga optional, n'sync ku devices. Available ku iOS, Android, n'web.
press.scanTip: Ku desktop? Skena n'essaamu yo ofune app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Tuli founding team entonotono etegula Chatforia — private, global messenger ey'okutandika ku web, iOS, n'Android. Nga oyagala privacy, encryption, n'delightful user experiences, tujja kusanyuka okuwulira okuva ku ggwe.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ntya okusaba: Kozesa button wansi okutuma resume yo n'links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Yamba okutegula foundation ya new global messenger.
• Ship improvements ezikozesebwa ku web, iOS, n'Android.
• Kozesa founder ku architecture n'product direction.
• Own high-impact areas: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Jjira ku beginning — nga user base tekyaze.

about.title: Ku bya Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia eri secure, multilingual messenger n'end-to-end encryption, instant translation, n'voice/video calling. Mission yaffe eri nnyangu: yamba abantu okukwata — mu ngeri ey'ekyama, ey'ekyama, n'okukyusa olulimi.

values.control: Control: Disappearing messages & read receipts nga optional.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages n'read receipts nga optional.

about.howDescription: Obubaka bukwaatiddwa ku kyuma kyo nga tebuvudde ku kyuma. Translation, backups, n'device sync by'okukozesa okukendeera kye server zaffe ziyinza okulaaba.

advertise.title: Advertise n'Chatforia
advertise.description: Tuwe abakozesa ab'okwogera n'okuwandiika n'tasteful, brand-safe placements. Tuwadde banner inventory mu high-visibility spots, sponsorships, n'house promos. Premium subscribers tebalaba ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Tukozesa inventory via Google AdSense. Osobola okutarget Chatforia n'publisher ID {{pubId}}, oba kozesa form wansi ku direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Tukozesa inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships zirinawo — kozesa form wansi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Tuli mu kutegeka ad inventory yaffe. Tutegeeza ku campaign yo era tujja kukuwa recommendations ku placements.

why.highSession: High session frequency n'dwell time mu chat UI
why.deals: Direct deals oba programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Webale! Inquiry yo eri ku way. Tujja kukuddamu mu kiseera.
form.mailtoInfo: Gulawo email client yo okutuma inquiry…
